title: German Man Solves Rubik's Cube In 23 Seconds While Freefalling, Sets World Record
summary_full: Tom successfully broke the record for the fastest time to solve a rotating puzzle cube while in freefall.
summary_public: Tom successfully broke the record for the fastest time to solve a rotating puzzle cube while in freefall.
